So maybe you can dump like the nav items and all that stuff.
Okay.
I think, I think you can take this kind of offline and you can give me like 30 minutes just to like think it through a little bit.
Okay.
We can, we can go from there, but thanks for flagging.
And then as far as the follow-up for that email, yeah, we'll probably just go with the current structure and I'll tweak the copy a little bit.
Like I will say what converted really well from the previous ones was this thing.
Like, just this.
So I don't know, Will, if you have time.
yeah, yeah.
We'll do that for the new workshop.
Sorry, it's not there already.
Okay, cool.
And it'd probably, yeah, just, it'd probably go to the same workshop, really, because we don't want to make a workshop for all of these, you know?
Yep.
And the join link, that is okay with going to the feed?
That one I might change a little bit.
Okay.
Yeah, I feel like that copy on that one kind of has too many CTAs.
I kind of prefer things just have, like, one very concrete, like, hey, join this.
And then, like, like, I almost don't want to share the, like, we'll just put this in the second paragraph and just make this the main CTA.
Yeah, but I can shape this one, and then, like, we can sync again so the next one you can directly send.
That's, all this isn't in flux anymore.
I know we're coming up on time, but community, the main thing, just call it for the community that's coming up is like, we actually want to launch it.
And the main thing is getting council members to kind of sign up and kind of like getting the site in a state, like we can launch basically.
So I'm going to think through that as well.
But the main piece is missing right now.
It's like, maybe like a landing page for the flagship kind of masterclass that you've been doing, Will.
Yep.
And then also a page, the council page, I think is already half up.
It's just not merged.
But yeah, we're trying to aim for the next week or two on getting that out as well.
I'll get more synced on the masterclass this week with Marcel, and then we'll, we'll start, we'll make sure Ed's read in and, you know, we can be building that and, you know, in flow.

And then the last piece here is just on the marketing side, like I guess Kyle, you know, through all this is probably a little bit more clear, like, like almost all these things we talked about essentially involve like driving a ton of people there.
Let's see.
So just on understory, I sent them like, you know, a message just saying some of the things that like we're not super happy with.
And then, so we're going to move to like weekly meetings where either Alex or Noffle will be on the call with somebody a little bit more senior.

And then, yeah, but I think the work from our side really is like, I mean, all things considered, maybe we didn't like arm them with everything and we weren't even sure internally, like how to do something.
So the more we can kind of set our processes for like, hey, here's a webinar that's coming up, here's our standard playbook, and here's your part in that.
Here's, you know, what, Jason, have to do, like, Gloria and Kyle, if you guys could do that.
Yeah, I have in there that I want to create basically like an SOP for them.
That was specifically for them with their enriching and syncing DiveSpot, but I can just, we can just have like a full-on SOP for just everything they're doing.
Okay.
And then I guess anything else worth calling out?
So like Understory and the playbooks.
Yeah, you asked about that happily.
So they say that normally it takes four to five weeks to get completely done.
Once we like have it installed, there's been all these things with like Okta and getting them in there.
So I finally have that done today or they have to still help me with one more thing, but it'll be installed today.
So then they say four to five weeks, but then Gloria is going to be out, correct me if I'm wrong, Gloria, like first week of November, right?
So we want to make sure that we have like the POC or like the MVP that they're going to build for us by then.
And with.
With Gloria and I able to review it and get feedback from her, make sure we have everything spec'd out in terms of requirements from her.
That way, while she's out, I can just be working with them on it and just doing revs to get it to where it needs to be.
Okay.
Just on that, Gloria, I guess when you're off, guess treat me, Will, and Marissa as the ways to cover.
But like as much as possible, you can shape like exactly what to do for, let's see.
I mean, the main upcoming event is probably going to be a dinner plus something for a launch.
So yeah, the more you can shape there, the better.
And then just let us know how we cover and when you're off, basically.
I'll have an out-of-office plan with the tasks, but my plan is to build out everything as far as possible so that it's really just keeping eyes on some things.
Okay.
Sounds good.

And then, yeah, and then considering how long this, like, EventHapply stuff will take, I think it's, like, we're kind of building towards something in, like, let's say a month and a half to two months where all this will feel a little bit more turnkey.

But in the interim, like, like, let's not let that, I guess, block things from being done, like, whether it just, like, we need to grab myself for two hours every week to literally send invites or, you know, the same for me or Andy.
Like, we'll just do that.
Or if we need to just, you know, like, hey, Zeus is here now, luckily.

So if we need to just, like, send a bunch of emails or do a lot of manual kind of, like, list reconciling to make sure we, you know, don't email somebody in my own ourselves texting, blah, blah, blah.
Like, let's just figure out how to do that manually.
Because I think we have all the resources we need.
Yeah, was just going to suggest, Gloria, if you...

have time right after this or some other time today, we can review what you need for the upcoming event and just do exactly what Jason's saying, kind of hack it, but that'll also help us with process, like knowing what we need to build in the future, so it kills two birds with one stone.

Yeah, I have a meeting with Jason for events right after this, but after that, we can meet if you're… Yeah, if you can just let me know when you're free, just Slack me, like, when to expect, because I'm going to head out for lunch real quick and then I can meet.
Yep, sounds good.
Cool.
I think that's it.
Thank you, everyone.
I'll see you all later.
Or very soon.
Thanks, everybody.
Have a good day.
Have a good one.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM strategy and address urgent event registration gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgent Event Registration:** The Thursday event has only 19 registrations against a 50-person goal. The team will manually invite contacts to fill the gap.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Community Conversion Path:** The team will build a custom landing page on `ai-ledgrowth.com` for content paywalls, replacing the limited Circle platform to enable better design and tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** New SOPs and a HubSpot list will standardize event promotion, enabling Gloria to delegate invites and improve collaboration with Understory.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [**EventHapply Implementation:** The EventHapply POC is due before Gloria's November vacation, allowing Kyle to manage the full 4–5 week build-out while she is away.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2728.0)

## Topics

### Thursday Event Registration Gap

  - [**Problem:** The Thursday event has only 19 registrations, far below the 50-person goal needed to offset no-shows.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The demand gen process is undefined. A last-minute event style change and Gloria's recent start contributed to the low numbers.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [**Immediate Solution:** The entire team will manually invite contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**Delegation:** Jesus will send invites for Jason; George will send for Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**Guidance:** For Andy's accounts, Gloria will target only those with upcoming renewals, avoiding sensitive accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Long-Term Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [**HubSpot List:** Kyle will build a canonical event list for easy segmentation and owner-based delegation.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [**Campaign Briefs:** Gloria will create briefs for all future events, starting with Q4 dinners, to define goals and target audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Community Conversion Path

  - [**Problem:** The Circle platform's limited editor prevents creating the high-quality, branded conversion pages needed for the `ai-ledgrowth.com` community.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [**Decision:** Build a custom landing page on the main website.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This enables superior design, better tracking, and a more attractive user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a single, flagship page that showcases the community's value and drives sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** The webinar follow-up email will use the current direct-link structure. Jason will revise the copy to focus on a single CTA and add a video thumbnail.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)

### Marketing & Operations

  - [**Understory Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)
      - [**Issue:** Dissatisfaction with demand gen results.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Weekly meetings with Understory seniors will begin.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle and Gloria will create a detailed SOP for Understory to clarify roles and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)
  - [**EventHapply Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2728.0)
      - [**Timeline:** The 4–5 week build-out starts today.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2728.0)
      - [**Goal:** Deliver an MVP before Gloria's November vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2728.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows Kyle to manage the full build-out and revisions while Gloria is away.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2728.0)

### Product & Community Launches

  - [**Growth OS:** A lower-tier "GrowthX Lite" package ($12k/yr) for dequalifying leads from the main program.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [**Check That:** A new product launch is planned, with details in a separate doc.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**AI-led Growth Community:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
      - [**Launch Goal:** Next 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
      - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
          - [A flagship masterclass landing page (Will & Ed).](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
          - [A council member page (partially built).](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2878.0)
      - [Meet with Kyle today to plan the Thursday event.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2878.0)
      - [Sync with Marcel this week to document event playbooks.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)
      - [Create campaign briefs for Q4 dinners.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [Prepare an out-of-office plan for November.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2775.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [Onboard Jesus to delegate invite sending.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [Revise webinar follow-up email copy.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2505.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2878.0)
      - [Meet with Gloria today to plan the Thursday event.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2878.0)
      - [Build the canonical event list in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [Create the Understory SOP with Gloria.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2643.0)
  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2505.0)
      - [Create a video thumbnail for the webinar follow-up email.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2505.0)
      - [Sync with Marcel this week on the masterclass landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2630.0)
  - [**Will & Ed:**](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)
      - [Develop a plan for the new community conversion page.](https://fathom.video/share/8Z3JQRX74v_yasGxTFqvbtfv96QT8ihm?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)

Meet Marcel Wed/Thu to capture event playbook

Install Understory integration; then deliver MVP by early Nov
